semantic.role: Defines the architectural rules and conventions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Establishing structural guidelines for the .spine directory
Defining rule enforcement boundaries for project mirroring
outOfScope: Specific implementation details of mirrored repositories

English.purpose: This document serves as the architectural rulebook for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining how the .spine directory structure and its rules should be organized and maintained.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for system architects and maintainers who need to understand the structural conventions and enforcement boundaries of the mirror system's rule framework.
key_takeaways: Defines the core architectural rules for the .spine directory
Establishes maintenance boundaries for rule enforcement
Provides structural guidelines for mirror system consistency

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统的架构规则手册，定义了 .spine 目录结构及其规则的组织和维护方式。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要理解镜像系统规则框架的结构约定和执行边界的系统架构师和维护人员。
key_takeaways: 定义了 .spine 目录的核心架构规则
确立了规则执行的维护边界
提供了镜像系统一致性的结构指南
